user.title: Add HA Sentinel
user.description:
HA Sentinel will monitor your Home Assistant updates and apply them safely based on your policy settings.

All settings are configurable after setup. The integration starts in **dry-run mode** — it will notify you about available updates without installing anything.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only one HA Sentinel instance is allowed.

data.backup_before_upgrade: Create backup before each install (Core and Add-ons)

check_now.name: Check Now
check_now.description: Fetch available updates and evaluate policy without installing.

install_now.name: Install Now
install_now.description: Force-install a specific update by slug, bypassing dry-run.

slug.name: Slug
slug.description: The slug identifier of the update to install.

dismiss.name: Dismiss Notification
dismiss.description: Dismiss the HA Sentinel summary notification.
